hooks.command: file_path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -q 'incidents/'; then if [ ! -f "$file_path" ]; then echo "ERROR: Incident file not found: $file_path" >&2; exit 1; elif [ ! -s "$file_path" ]; then echo "ERROR: Incident file is empty: $file_path" >&2; exit 1; fi; fi
